title: task
description: edhoc.rs:655-660 - process_message_1 takes the ephemeral secret for DH computation then puts it back (line 660). This allows the same G_Y to be reused if process_message_1 is called multiple times, violating RFC 9528's ephemeral key freshness requirement. After DH computation, the ephemeral secret should be consumed (not restored) to ensure each handshake uses a fresh ephemeral.
